title: Application
description: A Mule application deployed to CloudHub. Contains metadata about the application configuration, deployment status, worker settings, and runtime properties.

domain.description: Unique domain name for the application, used as the subdomain in the CloudHub URL (e.g., myapp.cloudhub.io)

fullDomain.description: Full domain including the cloudhub.io suffix

status.description: Current deployment status of the application

region.description: CloudHub region where the application is deployed

properties.description: Application properties passed to the Mule runtime

lastUpdateTime.description: Unix timestamp of the last application update

fileName.description: Name of the deployed application archive file

monitoringEnabled.description: Whether Anypoint Monitoring is enabled for this application

monitoringAutoRestart.description: Whether automatic restart on failure is enabled

staticIPsEnabled.description: Whether static IPs are allocated to this application

persistentQueuesEncrypted.description: Whether persistent queue data is encrypted

objectStoreV1.description: Whether the application uses Object Store v1

vpnId.description: ID of the VPN if the application is connected to one
